case_title: ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR OF L.A., A NEVADA CORP. VS CLASSIC PARKING INC.

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CLASSIC PARKING INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,017.60 FILED BY ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR OF L.A., A NEVADA CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT CLASSIC PARKING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
